title: Xtra Creamy American Suet Casserole
description: A rich and savory lacto-vegetarian casserole featuring suet and nuka-pickle, perfect for a post-workout meal. This umami-packed dish is both creamy and satisfying.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the macaroni according to package instructions until al dente, then set aside.
In a large skillet, sauté the chopped onion and minced garlic over medium heat until softened.
Add the shredded suet to the skillet and cook until lightly browned.
Add the chopped nuka-pickle, mushroom broth, and cooked macaroni to the skillet, stirring to combine.
Transfer the skillet mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix the heavy cream and shredded cheddar cheese.
Pour the cream and cheese mixture over the top of the casserole.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
